records.ety: [OE. sprot, sprotte, D. sprot; akin to G. sprotte.]

defs: A small European herring (Clupea sprattus) closely allied to the common herring and the pilchard; -- called also garvie. The name is also applied to small herring of different kinds.
A California surf-fish (Rhacochilus toxotes); -- called also alfione, and perch.
